_backup_metadata.title: TELUS Digital - Feedback survey: Innovation Lab Workshop - India

details.title: TELUS Digital - Feedback survey: Innovation Lab Workshop - India

headings.heading: On a scale of 1 to 5, how useful was the Axialent workshop (1 being well below expectations and 5 being above expectations)?
What aspects of the workshop did you find most efficient?
What aspects of the workshop do you think could be improved?
How would you rate the group dynamics during the workshop (1 being very poor, 5 being excellent)?
In relation to the topic, how do you rate the facilitator's mastery?
How effective do you consider the facilitator was in delivering the content and connecting with the work team?
How likely are you to recommend this type of workshop to your colleagues ?
Please leave us any extra comments or suggestions you may have.

answers.text: Different Mindset
NA
Excellent
Overall a powerful package shrunk in to a tight capsule.

The composition of the team. We would have gained from having the BPO support teams (TA, Finance, Facilities, HR) with whom there is conflict. The session we has were all from Ops. And 2 different BU's that do not normally interact.
We need to come together as a team with Support groups. BPO Business Ops feels the support groups (Facilities, Finance, HR and TA) do not understand and respond with the speed / agility required.
Overall workshop was outstanding and closer to reality
I am someone who likes notes, hence may be a spiral kind of workbook could have helped with notes
Judos to Anabel for being an amazing and enthusiastic trainer. She was outstanding.
It was an entirely great learning and experience
Probably we can add a few real time scenarios
It was an entirely great learning and experience and Probably we can add a few real time scenarios
The content and elaborative explanation of all topics
None
We should have more sessions on leadership and strategic planning.
Tools trainer shared with be more effective at work, like walk and talk, left hand column etc
We could add more activities and reduce the theory part
Overall, a good program.
Mock calls
Nothing
Great workshop in terms of connect
Victim -player mindset and trainer included to infuse Indian culture
It repected most of the concept from Beyond training, so need to add more elements
I really liked Anabel and Kinshuk's involvement in the training
Different mindsets
More real life examples and situations
NA
2 way communication and teach backs with engagement activities
NA
It was a wonderful experience and wish to have more workshops like this.
Connecting with like minded people who has different way of working, chance to meet and engage with other stakeholders. Walk Talk, Mindset, DISC were the most efficient to my knowledge
Mic setup could have been tested and thought through before hand to avoid last minute hickups. It did create some gaps during the conversation
Overall I truly loved the traininng delivery and content of the training, its was an awesome experience all together.
